title: Spicy Fluffy Egg Stir-fry
description: This Egyptian-inspired dish features a fluffy egg base blended with fermented vegetables and dairy-free ingredients for a spicy twist.

ingredients.name: Fermented vegetables (e.g., pickles), finely diced
ingredients.notes: Use a variety of colors for visual appeal

ingredients.name: Soy sauce or tamari, optional for flavoring

instructions: Heat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
Add beaten egg to the skillet and cook until slightly set but still runny, about 2 minutes. Remove from heat immediately.
In another pan or wok, sauté garlic for 30 seconds on low-medium heat.
Add diced fermented vegetables to the pan with a sprinkle of chili flakes. Stir-fry for about 1 minute until fragrant and slightly softened.
Fold in the cooked egg mixture into the stir-fried vegetables gently.
Drizzle soy sauce or tamari over the top if desired, then mix well again.
Serve hot as a side dish with rice or naan bread.
